reason_codes.description: Canonical actor could not be resolved from ingress evidence.
Multiple canonical actors matched the supplied ingress identity evidence.
Canonical actor exists but is not in an active lifecycle state.
Required role or scope binding does not exist for the resolved actor.
Required scope binding is missing or still pending confirmation.
Requested scope is outside the actor's granted scope bindings.
Scope binding tenant does not match the actor tenant and must fail closed.
Requested capability is not granted to the current binding snapshot.
Protected capability evaluation failed closed because no decision_ref was supplied.
Request must move to explicit escalation or review flow.
